import asyncio

from app.database import async_session
from app.models.source import Source

async def check\(\):
    async with async_session\(\) as db:
        result = await db.execute\(select\(Source\).limit\(5\)\)
        for s in result.scalars\(\).all\(\):
            raw = s.raw_data or {}
            sent = raw.get\('sentiment'\)

asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import select, func
from app.database import async_session
from app.models.source import Source

async def stats\(\):
    async with async_session\(\) as db:
        total = \(await db.execute\(select\(func.count\(Source.id\)\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        result = await db.execute\(select\(Source\).limit\(5000\)\)
        sources = result.scalars\(\).all\(\)

        with_sentiment = 0
        sentiments = {'positive': 0, 'negative': 0, 'neutral': 0}
        scores = []
        by_platform = {}

        for s in sources:
            raw = s.raw_data or {}
            plat = s.platform
            if plat not in by_platform:
                by_platform[plat] = {'total': 0, 'scored': 0}
            by_platform[plat]['total'] += 1
            if 'sentiment' in raw:
                with_sentiment += 1
                by_platform[plat]['scored'] += 1
                scores.append\(raw['sentiment']\)
                label = raw.get\('sentiment_label', 'neutral'\)
                sentiments[label] = sentiments.get\(label, 0\) + 1

        print\(f'Total sources: {total}'\)
        print\(f'With sentiment: {with_sentiment} \({with_sentiment/max\(total,1\)*100:.1f}%\)'\)
        print\(\)
        print\('By platform:'\)
        for p, c in sorted\(by_platform.items\(\)\):
            print\(f'  {p}: {c[\\"scored\\"]}/{c[\\"total\\"]} scored'\)
        print\(\)
        print\('Label distribution:'\)
        for label, count in sorted\(sentiments.items\(\)\):
            pct = count/max\(with_sentiment,1\)*100
            print\(f'  {label}: {count} \({pct:.1f}%\)'\)
        if scores:
            avg = sum\(scores\) / len\(scores\)
            print\(f'\\nAvg sentiment: {avg:+.3f}'\)
            print\(f'Range: [{min\(scores\):+.3f}, {max\(scores\):+.3f}]'\)

asyncio.run\(stats\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio
from app.tasks.backtest import run_backtest

async def go\(\):
    result = await run_backtest\(min_bettors=10, max_markets=200\)

    print\(f'=== BACKTEST v2: {result[\\"total_markets\\"]} markets \(junk filtered, midpoint probs\) ==='\)
    print\(f'YES: {result[\\"yes_count\\"]}, NO: {result[\\"no_count\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'\\nMarket baseline Brier: {result[\\"market_baseline_brier\\"]}'\)

    print\(f'\\n=== TOOL RANKING ==='\)
    baseline = result['market_baseline_brier']
    for t in result['tool_ranking']:
        delta = t['avg_brier'] - baseline
        marker = '** BEATS **' if delta < -0.001 else '  \(= mkt\)' if abs\(delta\) < 0.001 else '  \(worse\)'
        print\(f'  #{t[\\"rank\\"]:>2} {t[\\"tool\\"]:25} Brier={t[\\"avg_brier\\"]:.4f} \({delta:+.4f}\)  Acc={t[\\"accuracy_pct\\"]:5.1f}%  n={t[\\"n_predictions\\"]:>3}  {marker}'\)

    print\(f'\\n=== BY CATEGORY \(best tool per category\) ==='\)
    for cat, tools in result['category_brier'].items\(\):
        ranked = sorted\(tools.items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1]\)
        best = ranked[0]
        worst = ranked[-1]
        print\(f'  {cat:15} best={best[0]:25} \({best[1]:.4f}\)  worst={worst[0]:25} \({worst[1]:.4f}\)'\)

    print\(f'\\n=== WORST PREDICTIONS ==='\)
    for p in result['worst_predictions']:
        print\(f'  Brier={p[\\"brier\\"]:.4f} pred={p[\\"predicted\\"]:5.1%} actual={p[\\"actual\\"]} {p[\\"question\\"]}'\)

asyncio.run\(go\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio
import httpx

async def check_manifold\(\):
    import sqlite3
    conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/future_prediction.db'\)
    manifold_ids = conn.execute\('''SELECT external_id, title FROM sources 
        WHERE platform = \\"manifold\\" AND signal_type = \\"market_probability\\"'''\).fetchall\(\)
    
    resolved = []
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=15\) as client:
        for ext_id, title in manifold_ids:
            try:
                r = await client.get\(f'https://api.manifold.markets/v0/market/{ext_id}'\)
                if r.status_code == 200:
                    m = r.json\(\)
                    if m.get\('isResolved'\):
                        resolved.append\(\(ext_id, m.get\('resolution'\), title[:60]\)\)
            except:
                pass
    
    print\(f'Checked {len\(manifold_ids\)} Manifold markets, {len\(resolved\)} resolved:'\)
    for r in resolved:
        print\(f'  {r[0][:20]} -> {r[1]} | {r[2]}'\)
    return resolved

asyncio.run\(check_manifold\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio
async def check\(\):
    from app.database import async_session
    from sqlalchemy import select, func
    from app.models.source import Source
    from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
    async with async_session\(\) as db:
        for platform in ['polymarket', 'manifold', 'gdelt', 'reddit']:
            r = await db.execute\(select\(func.max\(Source.updated_at\)\).where\(Source.platform == platform\)\)
            latest = r.scalar\(\)
            print\(f'{platform}: last updated {latest}'\)
        now = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\)
        soon = now + timedelta\(days=7\)
        r = await db.execute\(
            select\(func.count\(Source.id\)\)
            .where\(Source.signal_type == 'market_probability'\)
            .where\(Source.resolved_at.is_\(None\)\)
            .where\(Source.resolution_date.isnot\(None\)\)
            .where\(Source.resolution_date <= soon\)
        \)
        print\(f'Markets resolving within 7 days: {r.scalar\(\)}'\)
        r2 = await db.execute\(
            select\(func.count\(Source.id\)\)
            .where\(Source.signal_type == 'market_probability'\)
            .where\(Source.resolved_at.is_\(None\)\)
            .where\(Source.resolution_date.isnot\(None\)\)
            .where\(Source.resolution_date <= now + timedelta\(days=30\)\)
        \)
        print\(f'Markets resolving within 30 days: {r2.scalar\(\)}'\)
asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
")
